privileged_info_summary: The task is an incident response scenario for Nx Witness VMS (version 5.0) running at https://localhost:7001. The system uses synthetic data: three virtual test cameras named 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', and 'Server Room Camera' are created during environment setup using the testcamera tool. The task requires: (1) enabling 24/7 continuous recording (recordingType='always' across all 7 days) on all three cameras, (2) updating the existing user 'security.operator' with fullName='Night Watch Commander' and email='nightwatch@facility-security.com', (3) creating a new user 'incident.cmdr' with fullName='Incident Commander', email='incident@facility-security.com', and role='Viewer' (a predefined Nx Witness role), and (4) creating a layout named 'Incident Command Center' containing all three cameras. The verifier uses the Nx Witness REST API to validate each requirement.
